findings.fix_prompt:
Remove the "Dev Bypass (Skip Login)" button, the "Choose Your Dev Role"
modal, and all "For development purposes only" copy from the sign-in page. Only
show these when import.meta.env.DEV is true. Never on the published
lovable.app URL.
findings.title: Dev login bypass visible to everyone
findings.what_we_saw:
On the sign-in page, a "Dev Bypass (Skip Login)" button opens a role picker and
signs visitors in without credentials. Helper copy reads "For development
purposes only."
findings.why_it_matters: Anyone with your URL can skip authentication on a marketplace app.

findings.fix_prompt:
Remove the "Developer Tools" / "Development Data Seeder" section from
the published homepage. Gate the Seed and Clear data buttons behind
import.meta.env.DEV only.
findings.title: Developer Tools panel on the homepage
findings.what_we_saw:
After sign-in the homepage shows a "Developer Tools" card with
"Seed Sample Data" and "Clear My Data" buttons.
findings.why_it_matters: First-time visitors will think the product is unfinished and bounce.

findings.fix_prompt:
Add the privacy page and the terms page routes with basic policy content. Link both
from the footer on every page. Use [email redacted] (or your
real support email) in the contact section. Match the rest of the
site's typography and spacing.
findings.title: Missing the privacy page and the terms page (404)
findings.what_we_saw:
Both the privacy page and the terms page return the custom 404 page. The footer links
to them but nothing loads.
findings.why_it_matters:
Sparkle collects booking and account data. Visitors and payment tools
both expect legal pages.

findings.fix_prompt:
Fix Quick Book so available slots appear, OR hide Quick Book when
no slots exist and show "No dates available yet, check back soon."
findings.title: Quick Book modal dead-ends with no slots
findings.what_we_saw:
The headline "Quick Book" CTA opens a modal whose time-slot picker
shows "No available slots found" and the "Book Now" button stays
disabled.
findings.why_it_matters:
The single most prominent CTA on the marketplace bounces every
visitor who tries to book.

findings.fix_prompt:
When the review count is 0, show "New" or "No reviews yet" instead of
a numeric rating. Only show the star number once at least one real
review exists.
findings.title: Listing cards show 4.5 stars with (0) reviews
findings.what_we_saw: Cards display "4.5 (0)", a numeric rating with zero reviews.
findings.why_it_matters: Reads like seeded test data, which kills trust on a marketplace.

findings.fix_prompt:
Replace "Hosted by Local Host" with each experience's actual host
display name from the database. If missing, show first name + last
initial or hide the line.
findings.title: Every listing says "Hosted by Local Host"
findings.what_we_saw:
Every experience card shows "Hosted by Local Host" instead of a real
host name.
findings.why_it_matters: Reads as test data on a public marketplace.

findings.fix_prompt:
Add a 1200x630 og.png to /public, set og:image and twitter:image meta
tags in index.html to /og.png. Verify with opengraph.xyz after deploy.
findings.title: Generic OG image, no preview when shared
findings.what_we_saw: og:image is unset, so Slack and iMessage previews show a blank card.
findings.why_it_matters: First impression when someone shares your link is blank, not branded.

share_metadata.description: Pre-launch audit. Verdict: Needs fixes before launch. 7 findings across trust, broken CTAs, mobile layout, and more.
share_metadata.title: LaunchLook audit for Sparkle Marketplace

verdict.label: Needs fixes before launch
verdict.narrative:
Polished at first glance: custom branding, booking flow, search, and auth.
Two dev-only features are still visible on the live URL, and the headline
booking CTA dead-ends. Fix the critical items before sharing outside your
test circle. Everything else is polish you can pace through this week.
verdict.summary: Two dev-only blockers and a dead-end booking CTA to clear before any wider share.
